---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Welcome to my research website.

[RNA Data Upload and Correlation Heat Map](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_CorrelationHeatMap_Ensemble.html)

[RNA Data Upload and Correlation Heat Map - Alternative Filtering Options](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_CorrelationHeatMap_ExpressedInOneTissue.html)

[RNA PCA Plots](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_PCA_Ensemble.html)

[RNA Differentail Analysis RowMeans >0](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_DGE_Interactions_RMG0.html)

[RNA Differentail Analysis Log2cpm >1.5](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_DGE_Interactions_lcpm.html)



[RNA CHDGene Overlaps Species DEGs](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_CHDGene_Comp_Species.html)

[RNA Cormotif Species](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_Cormotif_Comp_Species_Ensembl.html)

[RNA DGE Trajectory](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_DGE_Comp_Trajectory_Ensemble.html)

[RNA CHDGene Overlaps Trajecotory DEGs](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_CHDGene_Comp_Trajceotry.html)

[RNA Cormotif Trajectory](https://johndhurley.github.io/CrossSpecies_CM_Diff_RNA/RNA_Cormotif_Comp_Trajectory_Ensemble.html)
